MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. Motion is to be heard in LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 301. PLAINTIFF ESSEM VENTURES, INC.'S Hearing On Third Party Claim: TO BE CONTINUED TO A DATE STIPULATED BY PARTIES. MOVING PARTY IS TO NOTIFY THE COURT OF THE NEW HEARING DATE BY THE END OF TUESDAY, MAR-22-05. (301/JLW/ds) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-02-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Paul W. Windust, Esq. for Plaintiff: ESSEM Ventures, Inc.
Order waiving Plaintiff's appearance signed by Comm. Kaplan on 10-25-04 in file.
After hearing the evidence and declaration presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: IMG Home, Inc. dba International Market Gallery, as follows:
Damages $66,332.00
Prejudgment Interest $4,615.18
Attorney's Fees $660.00
Costs $412.80 and Bank charges $320.00, for a total of $72,339.98
Judgment signed in open court.

GENERIC DISPOSITION
Off Calendar Sep-01-2004 Off Calendar

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
